tool: Siril 1.4.4 `stat` over 480x480 boxselect regions (medians); darktable-cli 5.4.1 + lensfun updates DB for the synthetic-card arms
purpose: Quantify the dark-centre / bright-corner gradient visible in the SPCC judgment PNGs, in the LINEAR domain, and attribute it to a stage.

stack_linear_medians.input: qa_work/reg/FULL_lensfun_fit.fit (the approved 168-frame stack; SPCC input via its WCS-injected copy)
stack_linear_medians.corner_over_center: 1.27-1.37 LINEAR (all three channels, all four corners; radially monotone, near-isotropic, mild extra tilt toward x=0/y=0)
stack_linear_medians.display_domain_on_judge_pngs: 2.2-2.6 on both SPCC autostretch PNGs — the stretch amplifies the linear bowl; this is what the eye sees

attribution.verdict: The bowl is the darktable WARP stage applying lensfun VIGNETTING correction on top of the sky-flat-corrected lights — a double correction. It is NOT the sky flat (the validated with/without comparison ran without the warp and came out near-flat) and NOT sky structure (a real field is not radially isotropic about the frame centre).
attribution.card_test: uniform 128-gray 6064x4040 TIFF carrying the set's EXIF identity, warped through the production invocation: `nodist` output uniform (32896 everywhere); `lensdist` output centre 32919 / corner medians 43282 (max 51154) = corner gain ~1.32 display, ~1.8x linear (up to ~2.65x at the extreme corner). A pure geometric warp cannot brighten a uniform field; a vignetting correction does exactly this.
attribution.op_params_ignored: darktable applies a style's lens module with per-image auto-detected params and its DEFAULT correction set. Measured: modify_flags 0-7, method 0/1, a flipped inverse bit, and a BLANKED lens string all produce byte-identical corrected output; only the enabled bit carries. The pinned blob (method=lensfun, modify_flags=DIST, verified against darktable 5.4.1 source enums) was never honored, so the recorded 'modify_flags patched 7->1 = distortion-only' never took effect.
attribution.geometry_cross_check: stack corners sit ~0.6-0.7 of the sensor's corner radius after the -framing=min crop; the lensfun pa-model gain there, averaged over the ~1500 px drift, matches the measured 1.27-1.37 bowl

fix.mechanism: strip <vignetting> and <tca> from this lens's block in the lensfun user-updates DB — the data layer darktable actually reads — so distortion is the only correction it CAN apply. Implemented in scripts/darktable/install_lens_model.sh (idempotent, loud on drift; re-run after every lensfun-update-data).
fix.verified: on the live DB: 55 vignetting/tca entries stripped, fitted distortion entry intact; uniform-card corner medians == centre (32896) through the production invocation while the distortion warp remains active.
fix.standing_verification: after any darktable/lensfun version change: warp a uniform gray card through `lensdist`; Siril `stat` corner medians must equal the centre

consequences.artifacts_carrying_the_bowl: every warped render made before the strip: the approved FULL_lensfun_fit.fit, its WCS/SPCC derivatives, and the judge PNGs (both community- and fitted-model arms carried the identical gain, so the fitted-vs-community A/B and its approval remain internally valid on star-shape measures; corner star-count gains were partly vignetting-inflated)
consequences.why_downstream_cannot_fix_it: the sanctioned MW-safe background step for this dust-first frame-filling field is a first-degree plane (subsky 1), which cannot remove a radial bowl; full-model BGE could, but absorbs frame-filling faint MW/IFN (dead-end registry) and is ruled out by the dust priority
consequences.action: REBUILD required before any render work: re-run the stack through the stripped DB, then re-solve + re-SPCC. No render knob may be tuned against a pre-strip stack.

note_on_prior_records: skyflat_qa.json's '+6% overcorrection' and 'vignetting_pct 6.3' are display-domain / pedestal-diluted numbers from the warpless comparison — see its post_stack_audit note. The linear-domain measurement above supersedes any gradient claim made from an autostretched preview (dead-end registry: display-vs-linear trap).

fix_validated_on_data.build: 18-frame even stride of the 369 post-cull lights, full chain via run_undistort_pipeline.sh: master dark (214, pinned recipe) + sky flat (125 dark-subtracted lights, median, mul-norm — the validated recipe) + the STRIPPED lensfun DB. Artifact: july14/results/stack_set-01_novig18.fit
fix_validated_on_data.corner_over_center_medians: 1.000-1.014 across all channels and all four corners (Siril stat, 480px regions) vs 1.27-1.37 on the pre-fix approved stack — the bowl is REMOVED; the residual is within the flat's known small residuals
fix_validated_on_data.one_knob: the lensfun DB strip is the only change vs the shipped chain (declared deltas: flat rebuilt per the recorded recipe at 125 frames; 18-frame depth — a per-frame multiplicative field is depth-independent)
